title: rubus ristonii
intro: Rubus ristonii, also known as the Riston's Raspberry, is a lesser-known species of the Rubus genus, which comprises various types of bramble or raspberry plants. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus ristonii include its potential to aid in reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its possible role in boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus ristonii typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health applications.
